overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin in a truck simulator game, driving on a snow-covered multi-lane highway at night during heavy snowfall. The driver navigates with active windshield wipers, approaches a toll plaza, stops at the booth, and continues onto the highway.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the snow-covered highway following traffic ahead, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead in the same lane, visible through snowfall

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road covered in snow with visible lane markings
metal highway guardrail running along the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail running along the right side of the road
large overhead gantry with directional highway signs
tall street lights illuminating the highway at intervals

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along a wide, snow-covered highway at night with active windshield wipers. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road while overhead signs and street lights are visible ahead. Sparse traffic moves in the same direction through the heavy snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza approach with lane restrictions

events.description: highway narrows with concrete barriers appearing as the truck approaches the toll plaza
slowing down and merging into the designated toll booth lane as vehicles queue ahead

agents.ego_description: reducing speed and navigating through the narrowing lanes toward the toll plaza

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead slowing down and entering the toll booth lane

entered.detail: solid concrete lane divider barriers on the left side
solid concrete lane divider barriers on the right side
large toll plaza infrastructure with multiple booth lanes visible ahead
toll booth building structure with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a toll plaza as the highway narrows with concrete barriers guiding traffic into lanes. The toll booth structures become visible ahead with illuminated buildings on the sides. The vehicle slows down as it queues behind other traffic approaching the payment booths.

events.description: truck comes to a complete stop at the toll booth barrier
toll barrier lifts and truck accelerates through the plaza

agents.ego_description: coming to a stop at the toll booth barrier, then proceeding through the payment lane after the barrier opens

entered.detail: red and white striped barrier arm blocking the lane until payment is processed
toll booth window with payment terminal and operator area
overhead canopy structure covering the toll lane
electronic payment equipment and ticket machines at the booth

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the covered toll booth lane and comes to a complete stop at the barrier. The toll booth window and payment terminal are visible to the left under the overhead canopy. After a brief stop, the barrier lifts and the truck proceeds through the toll plaza.

events.description: exiting the toll plaza canopy back onto the open snow-covered highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating back to highway speed after clearing the toll plaza

notable_agents.action: truck passing in the left lane after exiting the toll plaza

entered.detail: multi-lane highway continuing beyond the toll plaza, covered in snow
metal highway guardrail resuming along the left side
metal highway guardrail resuming along the right side

segments.scene_description: The truck exits the toll plaza and merges back onto the open highway, accelerating to cruising speed. Metal guardrails resume on both sides of the snow-covered road as the truck continues the journey through the snowy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels along a snowy highway and navigates through a toll plaza. It begins with the vehicle moving through heavy snowfall at night, with active windshield wipers clearing the view of metal guardrails and distant street lights. As the highway narrows, the scene shifts toward a toll plaza where concrete barriers guide the truck into a queue behind other vehicles. The camera then moves under the overhead canopy of a toll booth, coming to a complete stop at the payment terminal before the barrier lifts to allow passage. Finally, the truck accelerates away from the plaza and merges back onto the open, snow-covered highway, resuming its journey past the returning metal guardrails.
